name: fetch_market_stats
description: Retrieve current market statistics for a specific area and property type: median price per sqm, 3-month and 12-month price trend, average days on market, and inventory volume. Use this to contextualise whether a listing is fairly priced, overpriced, or a bargain relative to the local market.

barangay.description: Barangay name for hyper-local stats. Optional — omit for city-level stats.

sqm_band.description: Floor area band for more precise price-per-sqm benchmarks. Optional.
